scenarios.description: parse(" 1.2.3-alpha.4+build.5 ") trims input and returns Semver covering non-null branch with pre-release and build
scenarios.expectedResult: return non-null Semver with version "1.2.3-alpha.4+build.5", major=1, minor=2, patch=3, preRelease=["alpha","4"], build=["build","5"]
pseudocode: TEST TC04 parse with whitespace, pre-release and build

scenarios.description: parse("") returns null covering exception path when StrictParser.parse throws on empty string after trim
scenarios.expectedResult: return null due to parsing exception
